name: Whole Wheat Bread (Machine)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the dry yeast in the inner pot.
2. Add all remaining ingredients except water to the inner pot.
3. Carefully pour in the lukewarm water.
4. Select the white bread setting on your machine.
5. Press Start. (If using a preset timer, refer to the instruction manual.)
6. After removing the baked bread from the auto bakery, slice it as desired.
